flake

flake 1'1'

[...] EN.NUN GE₆ 9 ⸢UŠ⸣ [...]

flake 2'2'

[...] ⸢2 1/2 MA.NA EN⸣.NUN GE₆ 10 UŠ ŠU₂ [...]

(flake 2') [...] the night-time watch is 2 1/2 minas. The setting [...] is 10 UŠ.

flake 3'3'

[...] 2 2/3 MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 10 UŠ 40 NINDA KUR [...]

(flake 3') [...] the night-time watch is 2 2/3 minas. The rising [...] is 10 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

flake 4'4'

[...] 2 5/6 MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 11 UŠ 20 NINDA ŠU₂ [...]

(flake 4') [...] the night-time watch is 2 5/6 minas. The setting [...] is 11 UŠ, 20 nindanu.

flake 5'5'

[...] ⸢3⸣ MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 12 UŠ KUR [...]

(flake 5') [...] the night-time watch is 3 minas. The rising [...] is 12 UŠ.

flake 6'6'

[...] 3 MA.NA 10 GIN₂ EN.NUN GE₆ 12 UŠ 40 NINDA ŠU₂ [...]

(flake 6') [...] the night-time watch is 3 minas, 10 shekels. The setting [...] is 12 UŠ, 40 nindanu.

flake 7'7'

[...] 1/3 MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 13 UŠ 20 NINDA [...]

(flake 7') [...], the night-time watch is [n] 1/3 minas. [...] 13 UŠ, 20 nindanu.

[...] ⸢1/2⸣ MA.NA EN.NUN GE₆ 14 UŠ ŠU₂ [...]
